title: Codeograph Knowledge Graph
description: Deterministic property-graph produced by the AST pass. Contains nodes[] and edges[]. Canonical-form serialised (sorted keys, sorted arrays, LF endings, no timestamps/run-IDs) so sha256 is byte-stable across identical runs.

nodes.description: All graph nodes. Discriminated by the 'kind' property.

edges.description: All graph edges. Discriminated by the 'kind' property.

build_tool.description: Build system detected for this module (ADR-002).

source_roots.description: Source root paths relative to the repository root. e.g. ['module-core/src/main/java']. Same convention as source_file on class/interface/etc. nodes (DECISION-2 resolved).

pom_path.description: Path to pom.xml relative to repository root. Null for Gradle modules in v1.

ClassNode.$comment: DECISION-1 resolved: stereotype uses short names, no @ prefix. 9 values, first-found wins when multiple present (rare). DECISION-2 resolved: source_file is relative to the repository root (e.g. 'module-core/src/main/java/com/example/UserService.java'). Must never be absolute — absolute paths break sha256 reproducibility across machines. DECISION-3 resolved: extraction_mode lives on ClassNode (not MethodNode) because the fallback applies to an entire class body, not individual methods.

modifiers.description: Java access and non-access modifiers declared on this class.

stereotype.description: Primary Spring stereotype (ADR-003 §9, DECISION-1 resolved). Short name, no @ prefix. Null if no stereotype annotation is present.

annotations.description: ALL annotation simple names present on this class, including those not in the interpreted list. e.g. ["Service", "Transactional", "Validated"]. Superset of stereotype.

superclass.description: FQCN of the superclass, or null if extends Object implicitly.

is_inner_class.description: True if this class is declared inside another class.

source_file.description: Path to the .java source file, relative to the repository root. e.g. 'module-core/src/main/java/com/example/UserService.java'. Never absolute — absolute paths break sha256 reproducibility across machines (DECISION-2 resolved).

extraction_mode.description: How this class's body was parsed. 'ast': full JavaParser AST (complexity metrics available). 'signatures_only': oversized-input fallback per ADR-005 (complexity metrics null). 'regex_fallback': JavaParser failed; per-file regex used (ADR-003). Applies to all methods in this class.

table_name.description: Database table name from @Table(name=...) or @Entity default (simple class name lowercased). Null if class is not an @Entity.

entry_point.description: True if this class carries @SpringBootApplication — marks the application bootstrap entry point.

wmc.description: Weighted Method Count — sum of cyclomatic complexities of all methods (ADR-004, Chidamber & Kemerer 1994). Null when extraction_mode is 'signatures_only' or 'regex_fallback'.

cbo.description: Coupling Between Objects — count of distinct classes this class depends on (ADR-004, Chidamber & Kemerer 1994). Null when extraction_mode is 'signatures_only' or 'regex_fallback'.

lcom4.description: Lack of Cohesion of Methods 4 — number of connected components in the method-field usage graph (ADR-004, Hitz & Montazeri 1995). Null when extraction_mode is 'signatures_only' or 'regex_fallback'.

annotations.description: Annotation simple names on this interface.

source_file.description: Path relative to the repository root (DECISION-2 resolved).

constants.description: Enum constant names in declaration order.

annotations.description: Annotation simple names on this enum.

source_file.description: Path relative to the repository root (DECISION-2 resolved).

annotations.description: Annotation simple names on this record.

source_file.description: Path relative to the repository root (DECISION-2 resolved).
Path relative to the repository root (DECISION-2 resolved).

MethodNode.$comment: extraction_mode is on ClassNode (not here) — it applies to all methods in a class uniformly. complexity metrics are null when ClassNode.extraction_mode != 'ast'. parameters uses ParameterFact (richer than NameTypePair) to capture Spring binding annotations per ADR-003 §9.

name.description: Method name. For constructors, matches the class simple name.

return_type.description: Return type as a string. 'void' for void methods. Constructor return_type is the class FQCN.

parameters.description: Method parameters with optional Spring binding metadata (ADR-003 §9 — HTTP arg binding category).

annotations.description: ALL annotation simple names on this method. e.g. ["GetMapping", "ResponseBody", "Override"].

cyclomatic_complexity.description: McCabe cyclomatic complexity (ADR-004). Null if ClassNode.extraction_mode != 'ast'.

cognitive_complexity.description: SonarSource cognitive complexity (ADR-004, Campbell 2018). Null if ClassNode.extraction_mode != 'ast'.

method_loc.description: Method lines of code excluding blank lines and comments (ADR-004). Null if ClassNode.extraction_mode != 'ast'.

http_metadata.description: HTTP mapping details if this method carries a mapping annotation (@GetMapping etc.). Null/absent if not a request handler.

exception_handler.description: True if this method carries @ExceptionHandler (ADR-003 §9 — REST exception flow category).

response_status.description: HTTP status code from @ResponseStatus(value=...) or @ResponseStatus(code=...), or null if not present.

response_body.description: True if this method is annotated with @ResponseBody (or is on a @RestController class, which implies it).

is_bean_factory.description: True if this method carries @Bean (ADR-003 §9 — Boot bootstrap category). Triggers a BeanFactoryEdge from this method to the return type.

FieldNode.$comment: DECISION-4 resolved: is_autowired is included as a convenience bool — makes it easy to query all injected fields without edge traversal; small redundancy with AutowiresEdge is acceptable. JPA fields: is_id, generation, column, constraints capture interpreted annotations from ADR-003 §9 (JPA core category).

type.description: Declared field type as a string. e.g. UserRepository, List<Order>, String.

annotations.description: ALL annotation simple names on this field. e.g. ["Autowired", "NotNull", "Column"].

is_autowired.description: True if this field carries @Autowired, @Inject, or equivalent (DECISION-4 resolved: include). Redundant with the AutowiresEdge but simplifies renderer queries without edge traversal.

is_id.description: True if this field carries @Id (ADR-003 §9 — JPA core category). Primary key field.

generation.description: GenerationType from @GeneratedValue(strategy=...), or null if @GeneratedValue is absent or field is not @Id.

column.description: Column mapping from @Column, if present. Null/absent if no @Column annotation.

constraints.description: Bean Validation constraint annotation simple names on this field (ADR-003 §9 — basic validation category). e.g. ["NotNull", "Size", "Email"]. Does not include JPA or Spring annotations — those have dedicated fields.

source.description: ID of the containing node (module, class, interface, etc.).

target.description: Called method ID — resolved to a known node in this graph.

call_count.description: How many times this method calls the target within its body.

target.description: Best-effort callee name. May not match any node ID — could be an external library or JDK method.

raw_call_expr.description: The literal call expression from source, for debuggability. e.g. orderService.findByUser(userId)

target.description: Depended-upon class ID. Feeds CBO computation for the source class.

AutowiresEdge.$comment: DECISION-5 resolved: injection_type fallback is 'field' — most legacy Spring code uses field injection, so this is the safe default when JavaParser cannot determine injection style. qualifier captures @Qualifier value when present.

source.description: Field ID carrying the injection annotation (e.g. com.example.UserService.userRepository).

injection_type.description: How the dependency is injected (DECISION-5 resolved: fallback is 'field'). Drives renderer output — Go has no field injection; NestJS prefers constructor. Emit 'field' when JavaParser cannot determine injection style.

qualifier.description: Value from @Qualifier(value=...) on this injection point, or null if no qualifier. Needed when multiple beans of the same type exist.

RelationEdge.$comment: JPA relationship edges (ADR-003 §9 — JPA relations category). Source and target are class IDs. Emitted for @OneToMany, @ManyToOne, @OneToOne, @ManyToMany annotations on fields.

target.description: Related class ID (FQCN). Extracted from the annotation's targetEntity or the field generic type.

cardinality.description: JPA relationship cardinality from the annotation name.

join_column.description: Column name from @JoinColumn(name=...), or null if not specified (JPA uses default naming).

BeanFactoryEdge.$comment: Emitted when a @Configuration class has a @Bean method. Source = the @Bean method ID; target = the return type FQCN (the bean being produced). Enables the renderer to wire beans produced via factory methods, not just @Autowired fields.

source.description: Method ID of the @Bean factory method.

target.description: FQCN of the produced bean (the method's return type).

ParameterFact.$comment: Richer parameter descriptor used by MethodNode. Captures Spring HTTP binding annotations (ADR-003 §9 — HTTP arg binding category) in addition to name and type.

name.description: Parameter name as declared in source.

type.description: Parameter type as a string. e.g. Long, UserDTO, HttpServletRequest.

binding.description: Spring binding metadata if a binding annotation is present (@PathVariable, @RequestParam, @RequestBody, @RequestHeader, @ModelAttribute). Absent if no binding annotation.

validate.description: True if @Valid or @Validated is present on this parameter.

constraints.description: Bean Validation constraint annotation simple names applied directly to this parameter. e.g. ["NotNull", "Size"].

HttpMetadata.$comment: HTTP mapping details extracted from @GetMapping, @PostMapping, @PutMapping, @DeleteMapping, @PatchMapping, @RequestMapping on a method (ADR-003 §9 — HTTP mapping category).

method.description: HTTP method. Inferred from annotation name (@GetMapping → GET) or from RequestMethod enum in @RequestMapping.

path.description: URL path template. Combines class-level and method-level mappings. e.g. '/users/{id}'. Empty string if no path is specified.

ParameterBinding.$comment: Spring MVC / REST binding annotation metadata for a single method parameter (ADR-003 §9 — HTTP arg binding category).

name.description: Explicit binding name from annotation value attribute, or null if not specified (uses parameter name).

required.description: True if the binding is required (annotation's required attribute, defaults to true for most Spring annotations).

default_value.description: defaultValue from @RequestParam or @RequestHeader, or null if not specified.

ColumnMetadata.$comment: Extracted from @Column on a JPA field (ADR-003 §9 — JPA core category). Only the attributes Codeograph reads in v1.

name.description: Column name from name attribute, or null if not specified (JPA uses field name by default).

nullable.description: From nullable attribute. Defaults to true per JPA spec.

length.description: From length attribute. Applies to VARCHAR columns. Null if not specified (JPA default is 255).

NameTypePair.$comment: Lightweight name+type tuple. Used by RecordNode components and AnnotationTypeNode elements. MethodNode parameters use the richer ParameterFact instead.

type.description: Type as a string. e.g. Long, List<Order>, UserRepository.

default_value.description: String representation of the default value, or null if no default.
